name: personal-task-board
description: Local JSON task-board commands for agent-first task intake, triage, updates, weekly summaries, and review evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Agent commands for a local JSON task board.
interface.longDescription: Personal Task Board provides Codex skills for low-friction task intake, task updates, next-action recommendations, blocked-task review, context resume packs, weekly summaries, and performance-review evidence capture against a local data/tasks.json source of truth.
